name_en: 🆕 【 M12760 Printed 】This Zippy coin wallet is made of iconic Monogram canvas, known for its compact size that easily fits into pockets or small bags. It features a monogrammed zipper for security and a wide opening for easy access to coins, cards, and folded bills. 11 x 8.5 x 2 cm (L x H x W)
